name: Slit Mouthed - 口裂け女
short_description: Slit Mouthed - 口裂け女 is a first-person horror adventure game based on a Japanese myth. The gameplay focuses on storytelling, stealth and decision making, there are also some puzzles for the player to solve, making gameplay more various.
detailed_description:
check out our new game and dont forget to Wishlist!

Join Our Discord:



Slit Mouthed - 口裂け女 is based on a famous Japanese urban legend called The Slit Mouthed Woman, staying true to the legend while adding our own twist to it we are certain that you will enjoy the gameplay.

Key Features:
  • Multiple Endings
  • Atmospheric environment.
  • Great storytelling.
  • enemy AI
  • Japanese Voice Acting (日本の声優)

Summary

You are 2 security guards working the night-shift in a mansion, the owner of that mansion experienced some "strange events", trying to go through your checklist, you soon face those "strange events" as well.
